title: Griffitharia thibetica

The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its extracts have been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Griffitharia thibetica include iridoids, gentiopicrin, and loganic acid, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Griffitharia thibetica is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to promote digestive health and alleviate respiratory conditions.
